description_long: This is a classic red Volkswagen minivan with a boxy, elongated body and rounded edges, reminiscent of the iconic VW Type 2. The front features a prominent VW logo, large round headlights, and a split windshield, while the sides display multiple rectangular windows and a single visible door on the right. The roof is solid and slightly curved, extending the full length of the vehicle, and the wheels are small with metallic hubcaps. The rear has a large window, a license plate, and a simple bumper, with subtle venting details on the side panels. The minivan's exterior is primarily red with blue-tinted windows and silver accents on the bumpers and wheels, giving it a retro, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban or suburban environments.
description: A classic red Volkswagen minivan with blue-tinted windows, silver bumpers, and a boxy, retro design. It features a prominent VW logo, multiple side windows, and a solid roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the VW logo, split windshield, round headlights, and silver bumper.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying four rectangular windows, a single door, and venting details near the rear wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large window, license plate, simple bumper, and taillights.
description_view_3: Left side view similar to the right, with four windows and no visible door.
attribute_window_configuration: Two-part front windshield, four rectangular side windows per side, one large rear window.
